headings.usage: Hero titles, main section headers, the personalized quote on the poster

body.usage: Coordinates, small text, UI elements, button labels, descriptions

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing. Elements must breathe like a high-end art gallery.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: The Tetris Grid (Mode A) for marketing sections. The Control Room Grid (Mode B) for the customization controls.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, labels. Center-align hero headings and poster contents to build symmetry inside the artwork.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#040814]/60 border-b border-[#FDFBF7]/10.
surface_strategies.cards_and_controls: Flat solid surfaces: bg-[#0A1128], 1px border border-[#FDFBF7]/10, subtle drop-shadow.
surface_strategies.poster_canvas: Neumorphism tactile variant: subtle drop shadow and crisp inner border to simulate a thick 30x50 physical canvas.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Buttons use hover:bg-[#B89947] hover:text-[#040814]. Links use subtle opacity fade or gold underline.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Framer motion for smooth fade-ins and staggered list items.
interactions_and_motion.scroll: Use Lenis for premium smooth momentum scrolling.

images.description: Dark starry night sky for the hero background.
images.usage_instructions: Use as a full-screen or large section background with a dark overlay (bg-[#040814]/70) to ensure text readability.

images.description: Romantic couple kissing under street lamp.
images.usage_instructions: Use as default uploaded image in the poster customization preview.
Use in the gallery section showcasing framed posters.

images.description: Silhouette of couple facing each other.
images.usage_instructions: Use in the gallery or storytelling section.

images.description: Blue and black sky with stars.
images.usage_instructions: Use as a subtle overlay texture with mix-blend-mode for the star map circle.

poster_canvas.photo_treatment: Must use CSS filters for Duotone/Gradient Map (convert to grayscale, apply navy/dark blue tint). Bottom of photo must gradient fade into the deep navy background. Apply a dark vignette to top, left, and right edges.
poster_canvas.text_placement: Center of canvas. Quote in Playfair Display, Date in Cinzel.
poster_canvas.star_map: Circular form located at the bottom half. Use realistic coordinate mapping or SVG star patterns. Constellations in soft gold. Must blend into the navy background.
poster_canvas.qr_code: Bottom right corner. Dark blue background merging with star map. Scan link goes to Spotify.

components.form_controls: Use highly customized Shadcn components (Inputs, Selects). Remove Vercel default styles. Apply dark theme colors and 1px gold/white-10 borders.
components.upload_button: Make it prominent with a dashed gold border and hover state.
components.live_preview: Must be sticky on desktop while scrolling through customization options.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, preview toggles) MUST have data-testid attributes.
